name: Local Trailers
description:
Scans your Jellyfin library for movies and series with YouTube trailer URLs,
downloads them with yt-dlp as MP4 files into a trailers/ subfolder next to
each media item, so every Jellyfin client discovers them as native local
trailers. Includes automatic yt-dlp binary management, proxy support, and a
daily scheduled task.
overview: Downloads YouTube trailers as local files next to your media.
